# Entry count

**Data field**

An unsigned 16-bit integer specifying how many subtitle text style records follow this entry count.

## Data fields

- **Size**: An unsigned 32-bit integer holding the size of the subtitle style atom.
- **Type**: An unsigned 32-bit field.
- **Subtitle text style record**: One or more records that provide details about the subtitle’s style.
